content:
Good morning! Here's the **07:00 SAST Saturday** nudge summary:

---

**1. Shopify Orders** — 🚫 Still blocked
No Shopify Admin API token, and the Orgo VM computer ID is no longer valid (needs to be re-fetched from the Orgo dashboard). Zero visibility into last night's orders.

**2. AgentMail** — ⚠️ Address confusion
`charlie@agent.studexmeat.com` and `ceo@agent.studexmeat.com` are **not set up yet** — they don't appear in AgentMail at all. The active inboxes are:
- `robusca.romanov@studex-group.com` ✅ (me — empty inbox)
- `naledi.cmo@studex-group.com` ✅ (empty)
- `nervousway750@agentmail.to` ✅ (CTO Sentinel — empty)

If you want Charlie and CEO to receive emails, those agent.studexmeat.com addresses need to be created in AgentMail first.

**3. Naledi's Queue** — 🔍 Couldn't access
The content-approval repo exists but I couldn't reach it without a running database/API. Worth checking manually if there's content queued.

**4. Ad Spend** — 🚫 Still blocked
Meta permanent access token expired **June 22**. Naledi still can't post or pull ad data. This has been a blocker for weeks.

---

**Bottom line:** All four morning checks are either blocked or empty. The big outstanding items from this week that need your attention:

| Blocker | Status |
|---|---|
| Shopify Admin API token | ❌ Missing |
| Meta permanent access token | ❌ Expired Jun 22 |
| Orgo VM credentials | ❌ Need re-setup |
| charlie/ceo AgentMail addresses | ❌ Not created |
| GitHub PAT | ❌ Missing |

It's Saturday — let me know if you want me to tackle any of these on the weekend or if they can wait until Monday! 🐄

**🌤️ Midday Check-in — Saturday July 11, 2026 (12:00 SAST)**

Hey Tumelo — still on the same blockers as yesterday. Here's the honest status:

---

**1. Orders**
🚫 No change. No Shopify Admin API token = zero order visibility. I can't see new orders, fulfillments, or customer info. This is the single biggest gap.

**2. Content (Naledi)**
🚫 No change. Meta permanent access token expired June 22 — Naledi still can't post to Facebook or Instagram. No posts went out Friday, and nothing scheduled for this afternoon either.

**3. Inventory**
🚫 Can't check — no Shopify access.

**4. ONE thing I can actually do for you right now:**
Nothing operational without the tokens above. But if you want to **make progress this weekend**, the single highest-leverage thing you can do is:

👉 **Give me your Shopify Admin API token** (or the URL to generate one: `Partners Dashboard → your app → API credentials → Admin API access token`)

Everything else — Meta token, GitHub PAT, Tailscale tailnet name — I'd love to help with, but I need you in front of those dashboards.

---

**What's still open from yesterday:**

| Blocker | Owner |
|---------|-------|
| Shopify Admin API token | Tumelo |
| Meta permanent access token | Tumelo |
| GitHub PAT | Tumelo |
| Tailscale tailnet name | Tumelo |
| Orgo VM credentials | Tumelo |

Everything is blocked waiting on you — so enjoy your Saturday and ping me when you're ready to unblock things. I'm here until 8PM SAST. 🐂

Vault sync complete. Here's the summary:

---

**✅ 12:00 SAST Vault Sync — Done**

**Files written:**
- `studex-obsidian-vault/daily/2026-07-11-MORNING.md` — Full morning standup consolidated

**Inbox plans cleared this run:**
- `AGENT-FLEET-MASTER-PLAN-2026-07-03.md` → vaulted
- `HOME-OS-PLAN-2026-07-03.md` → vaulted
- `OS-REDESIGN-ROCKETCHAT-PLAN-2026-07-03.md` → vaulted

**Commits saved locally (push blocked — GitHub PAT missing):**
- `5aa352d` — morning standup consolidated
- `0b5521c` — heartbeat state updated

---

**🔴 Top 3 blockers for Tumelo today:**
1. Shopify Admin API token → unblocks Charlie
2. Meta permanent access token → unblocks Naledi
3. GitHub PAT → unblocks vault push

**📅 Key dates:**
- July 20 — China outreach window (Ankole Beef / Luckin Coffee)
- CIIE booth deadline — appears overdue, needs immediate action

**War Room:** https://dehdxyf8nnyl.space.minimax.io ✅

GitHub push will continue to fail until a PAT is configured. Commits accumulate locally.

Evening standup complete. Here's the summary for Tumelo:

---

📋 **Evening Standup — Saturday July 11, 2026 | 17:00 SAST**

---

**1. Orders Fulfilled — Revenue**
> ⚠️ No real-time Shopify data accessible — Charlie agent is blocked waiting for Shopify Admin API token.
Blotato is connected but has 0 accounts linked (FB/IG need linking inside the Blotato dashboard).

---

**2. Content Posted**
> ⚠️ No automated posts today — Naledi agent is blocked (Meta permanent token expired Jun 22). Manual posting window until token is renewed.

---

**3. Ad Performance — ROAS & Spend**
> ⚠️ No live Meta Ads data accessible this session. Metrics need manual pull from Meta Ads Manager or Blotato reconnect once FB/IG is linked.

---

**4. Tomorrow Priorities — Monday July 13**

| # | Priority | Urgency |
|---|----------|---------|
| 1 | CIIE booth application | ⏰ **Urgent** — window closes Jul 20 (9 days) |
| 2 | GitHub PAT | Needed to sync today's commits |
| 3 | Meta token renewal | Unblocks Naledi + FB posting |
| 4 | Shopify Admin API | Unblocks Charlie + order tracking |
| 5 | Origin story | Tumelo still needs to share |
| 6 | RocketChat API | Global markets agent blocked |

---

**5. ✅ Today's Wins (Afternoon Session)**
- Logo brief for **C@f# N0!R** — finalised, ready for designer handoff
- **Biltong + Caviar site** — deployed → https://a0yo6e7my93k.space.minimax.io
- **B2B Coffee Rwanda site** — deployed → https://x3oj1mdkipgh.space.minimax.io
- **GitHub** — 3 local commits made, push blocked (needs your PAT)

---

**Memory + Obsidian vault updated.** All standup notes committed locally (`212de7b`, `c7030b1`). GitHub push will work once you add the PAT to TOOLS.md — just say the word and I'll push immediately.

Rest of the weekend, Tumelo. Monday is going to be busy 🫡

---

**EOD VAULT SYNC — 2026-07-11 | COMPLETE ✅**

**Commit:** `0241750` (heartbeat) + `bf4c8e0` (vault files)
**GitHub push:** BLOCKED — no GitHub PAT. Commits saved locally, ready to push when Tumelo provides the token.

---

**EOD SUMMARY — STUDEX MEAT | MIDNIGHT SAST**

**Orders & Revenue:** Unknown — Shopify Admin API token blocked, Charlie agent offline. Meta token expired Jun 22 — no ad performance data. No automated content posted today.

**What Was Built (Build Hour):**
- Studex Wildlife Coffee landing page → https://q1ohr7ejymux.space.minimax.io
- Full B2B coffee site with Rwanda A1/A2 pricing, origins grid, wholesale segmentation, caviar strip, WhatsApp inquiry form
- Orgo VM was rebuilt — n8n deployment deferred until fresh VM ID retrieved

**Research Findings:**
- SA subscription box market growing 16.3% CAGR — no major premium meat player = open lane
- n8n on Orgo VM is the priority automation unlock, not Blotato
- Studex sweet spot: R179–219/500g biltong (above Woolies, below SA Biltong)
- Voicebox → Phase 2 (revisit when daily inquiries > 50)

**🔴 TOMORROW'S PRIORITIES (Monday Jul 13):**
1. CIIE booth application — 9 days to Jul 20 deadline
2. Tumelo provides: GitHub PAT, Shopify token, Meta token, RocketChat creds, origin story
3. Robusca redeploys n8n on rebuilt Orgo VM
4. Robusca builds lead qualification flow in n8n
5. Meat subscription box concept + pricing model written for Tumelo review

**Unresolved Blockers (7 still open):**
GitHub PAT, Shopify token, Meta token, RocketChat API, origin story, CIIE app, Orgo VM ID

**Live URLs:** Biltong+Caviar https://a0yo6e7my93k.space.minimax.io | B2B Coffee https://x3oj1mdkipgh.space.minimax.io | War Room https://dehdxyf8nnyl.space.minimax.io | Wildlife Coffee https://q1ohr7ejymux.space.minimax.io

**Vault file:** `/workspace/studex-obsidian-vault/daily/2026-07-11.md` — full day's consolidated record written and committed.
